user.title: Alexa Smart Home — Connection Settings
user.description: Configure connection to the Amazon Alexa service.

data_description.amazon_domain: The Amazon domain where your devices are registered.
data_description.language: The language/locale code for Alexa authentication.
data_description.proxy_port: Local port for the authentication proxy server (1024–65535).
data_description.cache_ttl: How long to cache device states before re-fetching (30–3600 seconds).

auth.title: Alexa Smart Home — Amazon Login
auth.description:
Open **{proxy_url}** in your browser and log in to your Amazon account ({amazon_domain}) to complete authentication.

Once you have successfully logged in, return here and click **Submit** to finish setup.

error.auth_not_complete: Authentication is not complete yet. Please log in at the proxy URL first.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Alexa API. Check your network and cookie.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired Alexa session cookie. Please re-authenticate.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Alexa account is already configured.
